title: Daria Ardelean
text:
I am a first year PhD student in Italy, at the University of Padova, Department of General Psychology. I am also one of the doctoral students at the Galilean School of Higher Education, in the Social Sciences Class.
My main research interests are in clinical neuropsychology and meta-science. I have recently joined the Quantative Psychology Lab (QPLab) at the University of Padova, and the Open Neuropsychology Data Analysis Lab (ONDA Lab) at San Camillo IRCCS.
Outside of academia, I am a registered clinical psychologist in Romania, currently undergoing training in psychotherapy.

title: Curriculum Vitae
text:
Education and Research Training
Erasmus+ Traineeship in Non-Invasive Brain Stimulation — University of Padova, Italy
Aug 2025 – Nov 2025 · Supervisor: Giulio Contemori
- Participant recruitment, scheduling, and data collection for an experiment on visual segregation and integration using transcranial electrical stimulation (tES) and electroencephalography (EEG). Contributed to the multicentre TACS Challenge project, including a research visit to a collaborating laboratory in Rovereto. Tools: MATLAB, RStudio, NIC2.
Voluntary Internship in Meta-Research — University of Padova, Italy
Sep 2024 – Feb 2025 · Supervisor: Ioana Alina Cristea · 6 ECTS
- Running meta-analyses in R and working with existing RCT databases.
Erasmus+ Study in Clinical Neuropsychology and Cognitive Neuroscience — University of Padova
Feb 2024 – Feb 2025
- Coursework: Individual differences in cognition; Advanced social psychology and social neuroscience; Techniques and methods in psychological assessment (30 cum laude); Clinical neuropsychology; Psychiatry and psychopharmacology (30 cum laude); Neurology; Psychodynamics of family relationships (in Italian).
MSc, Clinical Psychology and Psychotherapy — West University of Timișoara
Sep 2023 – Sep 2025 · 120 ECTS · Final grade: Excellent
- Thesis: Moderators of cognitive interventions for mild cognitive impairment · Supervisor: Andrei Rusu
Research Training in Organisational Network Analysis — West University of Timișoara
Oct 2022 – Jan 2023
- Introductory training in Network Science; project awarded in a local competition. Skills: data cleaning, network analysis methodology, and analysis using Gephi.
Research Internship in Experimental Psychology — West University of Timișoara
Sep 2022 – Jul 2023 · Supervisor: Luca Tisu
- Worked with the Work and Organisational Psychology Research Group on the design of a strengths-based intervention for aspiring entrepreneurs and tutored students for the Experimental Psychology course.
Erasmus+ Study in Psychology — University of Padova
Feb 2022 – Jul 2022
BSc, Psychology — West University of Timișoara
Nov 2020 – Jul 2023 · 180 ECTS · Final grade: Excellent
- Thesis: Empowering future entrepreneurs: Testing a strengths-based mindset intervention in a quasi-experimental pilot study

title: Curriculum Vitae
text:
Work Experience
Clinical Psychologist — Syncare Psychology Clinic, Lugoj, Romania
Mar 2025 – present
- Currently training in psychotherapy. Provided psychological assessment and brief interventions. Registered as clinical psychologist under supervision since May 2024.
Project Manager — PROW Conference, Cowork Timișoara, Romania
May 2021 – Apr 2024
- Contributed to building the largest product conference in Western Romania; defined and monitored Objective Key Results; led a team of 10+ people. Worked on national and international projects including Timișoara Startups (project manager), Innovation Labs, and Techstars Startup Weekend Timișoara.
Project Coordinator — Association of Sociology and Psychology Students, Timișoara
Dec 2020 – Aug 2021
- Defined and monitored objectives, evaluated coordinators, fundraising and partnerships, organisation of online and on-site public events, and moderation of meetings and workshops.
